boundary: This profiler separates input build, point packing, OptiX preparation, prepared query, Python postprocess, validation, and close phases for prepared decision sub-paths. It does not authorize an RTX speedup claim without a real RTX run, same-semantics baselines, and independent review.

cloud_claim_contract.claim_scope: prepared OptiX fixed-radius threshold traversal for Barnes-Hut node-coverage decisions
cloud_claim_contract.cloud_policy: include in the same deferred RTX batch after the active evidence batch succeeds
cloud_claim_contract.non_claim: not Barnes-Hut opening-rule evaluation, force-vector reduction, or a full N-body solver

goal: Goal887 prepared decision OptiX phase profiler
source_commit_note: Stamped from .rtdl_source_commit after run because Goal887 profiler does not embed RTDL_SOURCE_COMMIT. Runner log also records the same commit. Timing/result fields are unchanged.
